revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:阿彌神社 (阿見町竹来)); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/76725504 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:阿彌神社 (阿見町竹来) | revid=76725504 --> == 西暦の不一致 ==
通りすがりの門外漢です。「関連する神社」節に「''貞観元年（862年）''」とありますが、西暦と和暦が微妙に一致していないように思えます。--[[利用者:JapaneseA|JapaneseA]]（[[利用者‐会話:JapaneseA|会話]]） 2015年8月3日 (月) 04:43 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == 参考文献について == 「国立国会図書館：国立国会図書館デジタルコレクションより閲覧可能な文献。」という記述はだめです。資料ごとにリンクをつけてください。--[[利用者:Falcated|Falcated]]（[[利用者‐会話:Falcated|会話]]） 2020年3月23日 (月) 04:03 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:阿彌神社 (阿見町竹来)); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/76725504 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:阿彌神社 (阿見町竹来) | revid=76725504 --> == 西暦の不一致 ==
通りすがりの門外漢です。「関連する神社」節に「''貞観元年（862年）''」とありますが、西暦と和暦が微妙に一致していないように思えます。--[[利用者:JapaneseA|JapaneseA]]（[[利用者‐会話:JapaneseA|会話]]） 2015年8月3日 (月) 04:43 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == 参考文献について == 「国立国会図書館：国立国会図書館デジタルコレクションより閲覧可能な文献。」という記述はだめです。資料ごとにリンクをつけてください。--[[利用者:Falcated|Falcated]]（[[利用者‐会話:Falcated|会話]]） 2020年3月23日 (月) 04:03 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:阿彌神社 (阿見町竹来)); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/76725504 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:阿彌神社 (阿見町竹来) | revid=76725504 --> == 西暦の不一致 ==
通りすがりの門外漢です。「関連する神社」節に「''貞観元年（862年）''」とありますが、西暦と和暦が微妙に一致していないように思えます。--[[利用者:JapaneseA|JapaneseA]]（[[利用者‐会話:JapaneseA|会話]]） 2015年8月3日 (月) 04:43 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == 参考文献について == 「国立国会図書館：国立国会図書館デジタルコレクションより閲覧可能な文献。」という記述はだめです。資料ごとにリンクをつけてください。--[[利用者:Falcated|Falcated]]（[[利用者‐会話:Falcated|会話]]） 2020年3月23日 (月) 04:03 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/76725504 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:阿彌神社 (阿見町竹来) | revid=76725504 --> == 西暦の不一致 ==
通りすがりの門外漢です。「関連する神社」節に「''貞観元年（862年）''」とありますが、西暦と和暦が微妙に一致していないように思えます。--[[利用者:JapaneseA|JapaneseA]]（[[利用者‐会話:JapaneseA|会話]]） 2015年8月3日 (月) 04:43 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 参考文献について == 「国立国会図書館：国立国会図書館デジタルコレクションより閲覧可能な文献。」という記述はだめです。資料ごとにリンクをつけてください。--[[利用者:Falcated|Falcated]]（[[利用者‐会話:Falcated|会話]]） 2020年3月23日 (月) 04:03 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/76725504 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:阿彌神社 (阿見町竹来) | revid=76725504 --> == 西暦の不一致 ==
通りすがりの門外漢です。「関連する神社」節に「''貞観元年（862年）''」とありますが、西暦と和暦が微妙に一致していないように思えます。--[[利用者:JapaneseA|JapaneseA]]（[[利用者‐会話:JapaneseA|会話]]） 2015年8月3日 (月) 04:43 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 参考文献について == 「国立国会図書館：国立国会図書館デジタルコレクションより閲覧可能な文献。」という記述はだめです。資料ごとにリンクをつけてください。--[[利用者:Falcated|Falcated]]（[[利用者‐会話:Falcated|会話]]） 2020年3月23日 (月) 04:03 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q17191825]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}

通りすがりの門外漢です。「関連する神社」節に「''貞観元年（862年）''」とありますが、西暦と和暦が微妙に一致していないように思えます。--[[User:JapaneseA|JapaneseA]]（[[利用者‐会話:JapaneseA|会話]]） 2015年8月3日 (月) 04:43 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 参考文献について == 「国立国会図書館：国立国会図書館デジタルコレクションより閲覧可能な文献。」という記述はだめです。資料ごとにリンクをつけてください。--[[User:Falcated|Falcated]]（[[利用者‐会話:Falcated|会話]]） 2020年3月23日 (月) 04:03 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q17191825]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ami_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ami_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:30, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:28, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/76725504 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:阿彌神社 (阿見町竹来) | revid=76725504 --> == 西暦の不一致 ==
通りすがりの門外漢です。「関連する神社」節に「''貞観元年（862年）''」とありますが、西暦と和暦が微妙に一致していないように思えます。--[[User:JapaneseA|JapaneseA]]（[[利用者‐会話:JapaneseA|会話]]） 2015年8月3日 (月) 04:43 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 参考文献について == 「国立国会図書館：国立国会図書館デジタルコレクションより閲覧可能な文献。」という記述はだめです。資料ごとにリンクをつけてください。--[[User:Falcated|Falcated]]（[[利用者‐会話:Falcated|会話]]） 2020年3月23日 (月) 04:03 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:46, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q17191825]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:15, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
